ORDER ON DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT AS TO LOUISE NICOLE IVES

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LOUISE IVES AND ANA KISHIHARA'S MOTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS TO MS. IVES AND DENIED AS TO MS. KISHIHARA. MS. IVES PROVIDED SUFFICIENT PROOF THAT SHE WAS NOT PERSONALLY SERVED WITH A SUMMONS AND HAD NO KNOWLEDGE OF THE LAWSUIT UNTIL JANUARY 2016. MS. KISHIHARA DID NOT ESTABLISH EITHER OF THESE POINTS. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. THERE IS NO BASIS TO AWARD SANCTIONS AGAINST MS. IVES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JUDGE KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Louise Ives and Ana Kishihara's motion to vacate the default judgment is granted as to Ms. Ives and denied as to Ms. Kishihara. Ms. Ives provided sufficient proof that she was not personally served with a summons and had no knowledge of the lawsuit until January 2016. Ms. Kishihara did not establish either of these points. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. There is no basis to award sanctions against Ms. Ives. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Mark Rosenberg, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Alicia Salvador who is present.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Louise Nicole Ives and Ana Kishihara.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
The Court orders the dismissal on file of Does 1-20. Counsel is ordered to file a dismissal.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $400,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $0
Other: $43,925.42
Total Judgment in the amount of $443,925.42
Judgment signed in open court.
